titleStmt.title: SII 37.567: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 567. (A.R. No. B 206 of 1943-44.) Kuḻittalai, Kulittalai Taluk, Trichinapally District, Tamilnadu.

summary.p: South wall of maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine of the dilapi dated Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1685, Svabhānu, Mārgaśira śu. 7, Sunday corresponding to 1763 A.D., December 11.
It records the installation of a liṅga in Chokkanāthapura-agrahāra by a certain Chinnasāmi Cheṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakābdāḥ 1685 kalyābdāḥ 48 śrīmadvyavahārika cāṁdra sauramānābdāṁ svabhānu saṁvatsara mārgaśira śuddha 7
Ādivāraṁ yī śubhadinamaṁddu śrī pārvatīramaṇa pādāraviṁddamiḷiṁdāyamāna svāṁtulaina śrīmatsamasta sadguṇaṣṭaiśvarya saṁppatvari pūrṇa
ṁḍaina putrapautrābhivadhiṣṇuḍaina maitrīkula gōtrābhirāmuṁḍaina dhūpāṭi vaṁśābdhirākā- śaśāṁkuḍaina Ayya gāliśeṭṭinaptuṁḍaina kuppiśeṭṭi pautruṁḍaina
śisśamaśeṭṭi putṛṁḍaina śrīlakṣmīmāṁbbāgarbhaśukti muktāphalaṁbaina śrīpāpamāṁbā kaḷatradattamai velaya śrī cinnasāmiśeṭṭiṁgāru śrīcokka
nāthapurāgrahāraṁbbuna śivapratiṣṭhagāviṁccinaṁduna nityasadāśāva śrīmīnākṣī cokkanātha svāmiṇa sahāyaṁ
Digital edition of SII 37.567 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
